name: node-ms
title: node-ms
description:
milliseconds conversion utility - Node.js module
This module provides a tiny milliseconds conversion utility able to
transform a string with a valid time unit to the equivalent number
of milliseconds and vice versa.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-ms because milliseconds conversion utility - Node.js module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-ms as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-ms with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-ms --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
